data.name: Hentai Elarin
data.detailed_description:
🌞 Hentai Elarin is an erotic hentai puzzle game that brings you into an ancient sunlit temple, where a seductive dark-skinned elf with golden eyes, adorned in jewels and divine presence awaits the one who dares to solve her… 🔱 Only the most devoted players will piece her together and touch her hidden passion! 🔥




✨ Game Features:
💖 30 intriguing levels that unveil her graceful body and mysterious essence!
🏆 30 achievements — for collectors of desire!
🖼️ Gallery — save and enjoy every unlocked illustration in the calm of a stone sanctuary!


🎚️ Difficulty Levels:


  • Easy — breathe in the warmth of sand and sun, and just enjoy!


  • Normal — uncover the path to her soul and body!


  • Hard — untie the knots of her submission… piece by piece 😉


✨ Lose yourself in her golden gaze, and let every solved puzzle bring you closer to her carnal, forbidden ritual. 👑🔥

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
